zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: 托盘界面视觉修复
changes: 底部徽标固定采用深色石墨铭牌，不再随系统浅色外观变成浅色底
保留金色图标、文字和描边层级，并移除会干扰阅读的扫光效果
托盘其余区域仍会正常跟随 macOS 的浅色或深色外观

en.label: Latest
en.title: Tray interface visual polish
changes: The bottom badge now keeps a dark graphite plaque in both light and dark system appearances.
The gold icon, typography, and border hierarchy remain, while the distracting shimmer has been removed.
The rest of the tray continues to follow the macOS light or dark appearance normally.
